title: Build session completion watcher
description: Monitor S3 for completed sessions. A session is complete when metadata.json has status 'completed' AND clicks/clicks.json exists AND transcript/transcript.json exists. Poll every 30 seconds. When a complete session is found, trigger the analysis pipeline. Track which sessions have already been analyzed to avoid re-processing.
tests: Incomplete session (no transcript yet) -> not triggered
Multiple sessions complete simultaneously -> all get analyzed
